table.name: vtiger_penalty
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_penalty` ( `penaltyid` int(19) NOT NULL, `penalty_amount` decimal(7,2) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_to_ivoice` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_type_penalty` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_penalty_description` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`penaltyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci

table.name: vtiger_penaltycf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_penaltycf` ( `penaltyid` int(19) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`penaltyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci
